title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Footprint

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Footprint
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
